calendar.matters:
PETITION Petition By Interested Persons For Order Directing Conveyance Or Transfer Of Real Property By Way Of Adverse Possession
Off Calendar Dec-08-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Franchesca Callejo for the Minor. Marta Eisenberg for and with Luis Rocha and Leticia Romero.

Ms. Callejo stated that there was no objection, that the Minor was disabled and receiving benefits and that the Grandparents had adopted her. In addition, she stated that the Minor would not benefit from the property, that she had no funds to pay for her share and that she beleived that the Grandparents wished for the adult Children to get the property. The Court granted the petition, (signing the order for the same in open court). The ex parte order dispensing with notice to Jose Guadalupe Sanchez was also signed in open court.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.
